summary: Centralized environment configuration in `server/config.ts` and implemented dynamic storage/session loading to decouple local and production dependencies.

plan.title: Create server/config.ts
plan.description: Create a centralized configuration file that handles `.env` loading and exports an environment-aware `config` object.

plan.title: Decouple storage interface
plan.description: Move `IStorage` interface to `server/storage_interface.ts` to prevent circular dependencies during dynamic imports.

plan.title: Refactor storage.ts for dynamic loading
plan.description: Use top-level await and dynamic imports to instantiate either `FileStorage` or `DatabaseStorage` based on `config.storageType`.

plan.title: Refactor auth.ts for conditional session store
plan.description: Dynamically select `PostgresStore` or `MemoryStore` at runtime to avoid importing database dependencies when using file storage.

plan.title: Unify server entry point
plan.description: Update `server/index.ts` to use the new `config` object and await asynchronous configuration steps.

acceptance_criteria.description: File `server/config.ts` exists and centralizes environment variable access.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check file existence and content of `server/config.ts`.

acceptance_criteria.description: Database connection in `server/db.ts` is only initialized if `config.storageType` requires it.
Server starts successfully in both 'file' and 'database' storage modes.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check logs for '[Storage] Initializing storage: file' or '[Storage] Initializing storage: database'.

acceptance_criteria.description: Session store in `server/auth.ts` switches between MemoryStore and PostgresStore based on configuration.

risks: Top-level await requires Node.js 14.8+ and ESM support, which is enabled via 'type: module' in package.json.
Circular dependencies if storage implementations incorrectly import the storage factory.
